name: second-word
description: Scripture in the space between reaction and response.

scripts.build:extension: esbuild extension/src/content.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=es2022 --outfile=extension/dist/content.js --minify && esbuild extension/src/options.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2022 --outfile=extension/dist/options.js --minify && cp extension/manifest.json extension/options.html extension/dist/ && mkdir -p extension/dist/icons && cp extension/icons/*.png extension/dist/icons/
scripts.build: npm run build:sandbox && npm run build:extension
scripts.verify:all: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run preflight:extension
